events.conversation:
Doorbell: *ding dong*
Delivery Person: Hi! I have a package for the Johnson residence. It requires a signature. Are you available to sign?
Homeowner: Yes, just one moment. Let me grab a pen.
Delivery Person: No problem, take your time. It's a pretty heavy box, so I'll just set it down here on the porch.
Homeowner: Thank you so much! Have a great day.
Delivery Person: You too! Stay safe.

Visitor: Hello? Is anyone home?
*doorbell rings*
Visitor: Hi there! I'm your new neighbor from across the street. Just wanted to introduce myself. I'm Sarah.
Homeowner: Oh hi Sarah! Welcome to the neighborhood! I'm Mike. Nice to meet you.
Sarah: Thanks! I was wondering if you knew what day trash pickup is?
Homeowner: It's every Tuesday and Friday morning. They usually come around 7 AM.
Sarah: Perfect, thank you so much! I'll let you get back to your day.
Homeowner: No problem! Feel free to stop by anytime.

Mail Carrier: Good afternoon! I have a certified letter that needs a signature.
Homeowner: Sure, what's it regarding?
Mail Carrier: It's from the county clerk's office. I just need you to sign here on line 23.
Homeowner: Okay, got it. Here you go.
Mail Carrier: Perfect. You'll receive a confirmation number via email within 24 hours. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Homeowner: No, that's all. Thank you!
Mail Carrier: You're welcome. Have a wonderful afternoon!

Teenager 1: Dude, hurry up! The bus is gonna be here any minute.
Teenager 2: I'm coming! I just had to grab my science project from the garage.
Teenager 1: Did you finish the math homework? I totally forgot about it.
Teenager 2: Yeah, you can copy mine on the bus. But you owe me lunch.
Teenager 1: Deal. Oh wait, I think I hear it coming.
Teenager 2: Finally! I thought we were gonna have to walk today.
*bus arrives*
Both: See you later!

Solicitor: *knocks on door* Hello! I'm with Green Energy Solutions. We're offering free home energy audits in your neighborhood this week.
*waits 10 seconds*
Solicitor: Is anyone home? We can help you save up to 30% on your electricity bills.
*waits another 15 seconds*
Solicitor: Alright, I'll just leave this brochure here. You can call us if you're interested. Have a great day!
*places flyer in door and leaves*
